fragility_points: Residual uncertainty remains until exact Binance 1m candles are archived for the qualifying hour.
A data-display or rule-interpretation anomaly could still challenge the obvious reading.
key_assumptions: A Binance 1h high above 2400 implies at least one underlying 1m high above 2400 in that hour.
The observed Binance print falls inside the contract's April 13-19 ET window.
main_logical_chain: Start from the market's extreme 91.6% prior and ask what would justify it.
Read the contract rules and identify Binance ETH/USDT 1m highs as the governing source of truth.
Check Binance price data and find a high above 2400 within the contract window.
Conclude the market is likely pricing already-satisfied settlement-relevant evidence rather than speculative future upside.
main_thesis: The market's 91.6% Yes price is mostly justified because Binance appears already to have printed above $2,400 within the contract window, making this more a source-of-truth case than a fresh directional ETH bet.
quote_anchors: This market will immediately resolve to Yes if any Binance 1-minute candle for ETH/USDT... has a final High price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title.
source_quality_view: Strong primary rules source plus strong venue-specific verification; residual precision gap from not saving the exact 1m series.
strongest_disconfirmers: The saved verification artifact used Binance 1h candles rather than directly archived 1m candles.
CoinGecko contextual highs were lower, showing non-governing feeds can diverge from Binance.
strongest_supports: Polymarket rules explicitly name Binance ETH/USDT 1m candle highs as the settlement source.
Binance ETHUSDT kline data showed a 2415.50 high on 2026-04-14 within the relevant window.
timing_relevance: High; this is a date-window threshold contract and the key evidence appears to have occurred already on April 14.
unresolved_ambiguities: Whether the exact 1m chart series used by Polymarket/UMA perfectly matches the saved Binance verification path.
Why the market remains at 91.6% rather than even closer to certainty.
what_would_change_view: Direct Binance 1m data showing no qualifying candle, or an official Polymarket/UMA clarification excluding the observed print, would materially reduce the estimate.
